description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 36-39.

Level 20

Legendary Points

Starting at 20th level, you gain Legendary Points. Your level determines the number of points you have, as shown in the Legendary Points column of the Legendary Cleric table. You can take the Recover action on your turn to regain all expended Legendary Points. You can spend these points to fuel various features.

Legendary Resistance

Starting at 20th level, you can expend 1 Legendary Point when you fail a saving throw to succeed instead.

Legendary AC

At 20th level, if your AC calculation is lower than your level, you can use your level as your AC instead. If you are using your Legendary AC, you cannot further increase your AC in any way, except by temporary AC increases or

Cantrips

Prepared

Known

Spells

magical effects lasting 1 hour or less. Other spells and effects that increase your AC only affect your regular AC.

Burst of Divinity

Also at 20th level, as an action, you can expend 1 Legendary Point and point your holy symbol at a creature you can see within 60 feet. You either restore hit points to the creature equal to your level x 5 or have the creature take an amount of Necrotic or Radiant damage (your choice) equal to your level x 5.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
